properties.name: VLLM_MODEL
properties.description: The model being served by the openai-api running at VLLM_URI

properties.name: API_TOKEN
properties.description: The API Token that can access the openai api
properties.defaultValue: Must be set for anonymous VLLM, but can be anything

properties.name: MAX_MODEL_LEN
properties.description: The largest model length that can fit on the GPU

properties.name: INPUT_TOKEN_CHUNK_SIZE
properties.description: The input size maximum, roughly 20%-25% of max model length

properties.name: INPUT_CHUNK_TOKEN_OVERLAP
properties.description: Overlap between split input chunks. Probably much smaller than INPUT_TOKEN_CHUNK_SIZE

properties.name: CLASSIFIERS_LIST
properties.description: Comma-separated list of classifiers to include in the summary output.

properties.name: CLASSIFIERS_FILE
properties.description: The package-relative OR absolute filename of the classifiers json file

properties.name: CLASSIFIER_CONFIDENCE_MINIMUM
properties.description: The minimum confidence of classifiers to include in classifiers output. When set to 0.3, classifiers with <0.3 confidence are excluded from produced tracks.

properties.name: ENABLE_DEBUG
properties.description: If true, each detection will include extra debug output.

properties.name: PROMPT_TEMPLATE
properties.description: If set, will override the default, tested prompt template with one read from a different file

properties.name: VLLM_URI
properties.description: The base_url of the openai-api-compatible API providing access to your model.

properties.name: VLLM_HEALTH_URI
properties.description: An absolute OR relative URI of a healthcheck for the openai-api backend

properties.name: TARGET_SEGMENT_LENGTH
properties.description: If this value is less than or equal to 0, no segmenting will be performed.

properties.name: VFR_TARGET_SEGMENT_LENGTH
properties.description: If this value is less than or equal to 0, no segmenting will be performed on variable frame rate videos.

actions.name: QWEN SPEECH SUMMARIZATION (WITH FF REGION) ACTION

tasks.name: QWEN SPEECH SUMMARIZATION (WITH FF REGION) TASK
actions: QWEN SPEECH SUMMARIZATION (WITH FF REGION) ACTION

pipelines.name: WHISPER SPEECH DETECTION WITH QWEN SUMMARIZATION PIPELINE
pipelines.description: Runs Whisper speech detection on audio or video and summarizes the transcript using QWEN.
tasks: QWEN SPEECH SUMMARIZATION (WITH FF REGION) TASK
